      "question": "The Four Colour Problem states that any planar map can be coloured using 4 colours such that no adjacent regions have the same colour. What is the current status of the Four Colour Problem?",
      "options": ["A) Proven false", "B) Proven true", "C) Undecidable", "D) Partially solved"],
      "correct": 2,
